overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following a medieval cook through a stone-walled dwelling. The character kneads dough in a candlelit room, ascends a narrow staircase, and cooks at a fireplace in a rustic kitchen before departing.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval bakery room with dough trough

events.description: character stops kneading dough and stands up from the trough

agents.ego_description: kneading and working with dough in a large wooden trough by candlelight

entered.detail: large oval wooden basin for kneading dough
single candle providing warm flickering light on a wooden ledge
heavy wooden door with arched stone frame

segments.scene_description: In a dimly lit stone room, a cook kneads dough in a large wooden trough illuminated by a single candle. The scene is static until the character finishes working and stands up.

events.description: exits the dough room into a larger corridor with a wooden cart
begins ascending the narrow stone staircase
reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the kitchen entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through stone corridors and climbing a winding staircase illuminated by wall sconces

entered.detail: wooden wheelbarrow with cloth covering parked against the wall
wall-mounted iron sconce with burning torch
narrow winding stairs with rough stone steps
arched stone doorway at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the bakery room and walks through a stone corridor past a wooden cart, then ascends a narrow torch-lit staircase toward an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic kitchen with hearth and cooking pots

events.description: enters the kitchen area with the large stone fireplace
begins cooking at the fireplace, ladling contents from a large iron pot

agents.ego_description: approaching the fireplace and cooking with a ladle, transferring food between pots over the open flame

entered.detail: large stone hearth with active fire and cooking implements
black iron pot suspended over the fire with steam rising
wooden shelves holding pottery and kitchen supplies
copper cookware hanging from hooks on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a warm kitchen dominated by a stone fireplace, approaches the hearth, and engages in cooking activities, ladling steaming food from iron pots while surrounded by wooden shelves and hanging copper pans.

events.description: finishes cooking and walks away from the fireplace toward the exit

agents.ego_description: walking away from the cooking area and exiting the kitchen through a wooden doorway

entered.detail: doorway leading out of the kitchen to the corridor

segments.scene_description: After finishing the cooking task, the character turns away from the fireplace and walks through a doorway, leaving the kitchen behind and entering a dimly lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, solitary workspace through a stone dwelling into a warm, bustling kitchen. It begins in a dimly lit stone room where a cook kneads dough by the light of a single candle before standing and departing the area. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a stone corridor past a wooden cart and ascends a narrow, torch-lit staircase toward an upper level. The camera then follows the cook into a warm kitchen dominated by a stone fireplace, where the environment opens up to reveal hanging copper pans and steaming iron pots. Finally, the character turns away from the hearth and walks through a doorway, leaving the warmth of the kitchen behind to enter a dimly lit corridor.
